notes: house decision convention: SAQ-A eligible iff fully outsourced (redirect/iframe to a compliant TPSP) AND no merchant code touches PAN AND merchant servers never receive PAN; if the merchant controls page elements/scripts but does not store/process/transmit PAN on its servers -> SAQ A-EP; if merchant servers touch PAN or volume/brand requires -> full ROC. Brand/acquirer can always mandate ROC regardless (brand-defined).
